message.en: Hey 👋 I'm one of the Botiques — your guide. What are you interested in?
message.sr: Hej 👋 Ja sam jedan od Botique-ova — tvoj vodič. Šta te zanima?

message.en:
We build smart automation tools and AI-powered products that help businesses and entrepreneurs run faster — without developers and a large budget.

From building websites in a few minutes to automatically collecting payments, we turn complex processes into simple software. Our mission: give every business the tools that until now were reserved for corporations.
message.sr:
Pravimo pametne alate za automatizaciju i AI proizvode koji pomažu preduzećima i preduzetnicima da rade brže — bez programera i velikog budžeta.

Od izgradnje sajtova za par minuta do automatskog prikupljanja uplata, kompleksne procese pretvaramo u jednostavan softver. Naša misija: dati svakom biznisu alate koji su do sada bili rezervisani za korporacije.

message.en:
Most businesses hit the same walls:

⏱️ Wasted hours on repetitive tasks
💸 Late payments destroy cash flow
🌐 No website or paying too much for it
🛒 Can't afford developers for a web shop
🤖 Missing out on 24/7 client engagement

We built one product for each of these problems — affordable, fast to set up and built for people who aren't IT experts.
message.sr:
Većina biznisa nailazi na iste prepreke:

⏱️ Izgubljeni sati na ponavljajuće zadatke
💸 Zakasnele uplate uništavaju keš flow
🌐 Nema sajt ili plaća previše za njega
🛒 Ne može da priušti programere za web shop
🤖 Propušta angažman klijenata 24/7

Napravili smo po jedan proizvod za svaki od ovih problema — pristupačno, brzo za postavljanje i napravljeno za ljude koji nisu IT stručnjaci.

message.en: We have 4 products for modern businesses. Which one are you interested in?
message.sr: Imamo 4 proizvoda za moderne biznise. Koji te zanima?

message.en:
🌐 **Webique** — Build a premium website without a single line of code.

Webique is an ultra-simple drag-and-drop website generator designed for speed. Just add content, arrange blocks and click publish. Your website is live in under 10 minutes — literally.

Built for conversion, not for confusion. No complex editor, no subscriptions to 5 different tools. You get a fast, professional site that gets results.

✅ Drag & drop — no more code ever
✅ Live in 10 minutes
✅ Optimized for speed & sales
✅ Perfect for freelancers, businesses & agencies
message.sr:
🌐 **Webique** — Napravi vrhunski sajt bez ijednog reda koda.

Webique je ultra-jednostavan drag-and-drop generator sajtova dizajniran za brzinu. Samo dodaj sadržaj, posloži blokove i klikni objavi. Tvoj sajt je živ za manje od 10 minuta — bukvalno.

Napravljen za konverziju, ne za zbunjivanje. Bez kompleksnog editora, bez pretplate na 5 različitih alata. Dobijaš brz, profesionalan sajt koji daje rezultate.

✅ Drag & drop — nikad više koda
✅ Živ za 10 minuta
✅ Optimizovan za brzinu i prodaju
✅ Savršen za frilensere, biznise i agencije

message.en:
🔔 **Remique** — Put your debt collection on autopilot.

Chasing clients for payment is exhausting, awkward and eats your time. Remique eliminates that completely. Connect invoices, set reminder schedules and Remique automatically tracks clients — politely, but persistently.

No more uncomfortable calls. No more forgotten invoices. Your cash flow stays healthy while you focus on what actually drives the business.

✅ Automated reminders via email, SMS, Viber, WhatsApp
✅ Customizable reminder schedules
✅ Drastically reduces late payments
✅ Works while you sleep
message.sr:
🔔 **Remique** — Stavi naplatu potraživanja na autopilot.

Jurenje klijenata za uplatu je iscrpljujuće, neprijatno i jede tvoje vreme. Remique to u potpunosti eliminiše. Poveži fakture, podesi raspored podsetnika i Remique automatski prati klijente — ljubazno, ali uporno.

Nema više neprijatnih poziva. Nema više zaboravljenih faktura. Tvoj keš flow ostaje zdrav dok ti se fokusiraš na ono što zaista pokreće biznis.

✅ Automatski podsetnici putem email-a, SMS-a, Viber-a, WhatsApp-a
✅ Prilagodljivi rasporedi podsetnika
✅ Drastično smanjuje kašnjenja uplata
✅ Radi dok ti spavaš

message.en:
🤖 **Botique** — Your custom AI chatbot, live in a few minutes.

You're actually talking to Botique right now — this chat is a live example.

Botique allows you to set up a custom chatbot on your site that engages visitors, answers questions, collects leads and supports clients — 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. While you sleep, it works.

No need for developers. You define questions and answers, we handle the rest. Pay only for what you use — without fat monthly subscriptions.

✅ Live 24/7 — never misses a lead
✅ Custom Q&A or AI-powered conversations
✅ Lead capture built in
✅ Embed it anywhere in a few minutes
message.sr:
🤖 **Botique** — Tvoj custom AI chatbot, živ za par minuta.

Upravao pričaš sa Botique-om — ovaj chat je živi primer.

Botique ti omogućava da postaviš custom chatbota na svom sajtu koji angažuje posetioce, odgovara na pitanja, sakuplja lidove i podržava klijente — 24 sata dnevno, 7 dana u nedelji. Dok ti spavaš, on radi.

Nema potrebe za developerima. Ti definišeš pitanja i odgovore, mi se brinemo za ostalo. Plaćaj samo onoliko koliko koristiš — bez gojaznih mesečnih pretplata.

✅ Živ 24/7 — nikad ne propušta lid
✅ Custom Q&A ili AI-pokretani razgovori
✅ Prikupljanje lidova ugrađeno
✅ Ugradi ga bilo gde za par minuta

message.en:
🛒 **Shopique** — Launch a fully equipped online store in a few hours.

Shopique is an ultra-simple web shop generator. Add products and they're visible immediately — no waiting, no approval process. Add categories, filters, descriptions and images. The store is ready for selling.

No technical headaches. No developer invoices. Just choose a style, add products and start selling. Built for people who want to move fast and look great.

✅ Products visible immediately after adding
✅ Categories, filters and product pages included
✅ Beautiful layouts, without design skills
✅ From zero to selling in a few hours
message.sr:
🛒 **Shopique** — Pokreni potpuno opremljenu online prodavnicu za par sati.

Shopique je ultra-jednostavan generator web shopova. Dodaj proizvode i odmah su vidljivi — bez čekanja, bez procesa odobravanja. Dodaj kategorije, filtere, opise i slike. Prodavnica je spremna za prodaju.

Nema tehničkih glavobolja. Nema faktura za developere. Samo izaberi stil, dodaj proizvode i počni da prodaješ. Napravljeno za ljude koji žele da se kreću brzo i izgledaju sjajno.

✅ Proizvodi vidljivi odmah nakon dodavanja
✅ Kategorije, filteri i stranice proizvoda uključeni
✅ Prelepi izgledi, bez veština dizajniranja
✅ Od nule do prodaje za par sati

message.en:
Starting is simple — without long onboarding, without sales calls.

1️⃣ Choose the product that fits your problem
2️⃣ Register — most products are live the same day
3️⃣ If you need something custom, reach out to us and we'll jointly define the scope

Unsure which product is right for you? Send us a message and we'll point you in the right direction.
message.sr:
Početak je jednostavan — bez dugotrajnog uvođenja, bez prodajnih poziva.

1️⃣ Izaberi proizvod koji odgovara tvom problemu
2️⃣ Registruj se — većina proizvoda je živa isti dan
3️⃣ Ako ti treba nešto custom, javi nam se i zajednički ćemo definisati obim

Nisi siguran koji proizvod je pravi za tebe? Pošalji nam poruku i usmerićemo te u pravom smeru.

message.en: We're glad you're contacting us! Fill in the details below and we'll get back to you shortly. 🚀
message.sr: Drago nam je da ćeš nas kontaktirati! Popuni podatke ispod i javićemo ti se uskoro. 🚀
